calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-03-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JACK PRAETZELLIS, ESQ. of Fox Rothschild LLP, Tel No. 415-364-5540 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Mariposa Castro's motion for order have requests for admission deemed admitted is unopposed and granted. Moving party to serve the within Order with Notice of Entry on defendant. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $400.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid within twenty days of service of said Order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Copel Responses To Plaintiffs First Request For Production Of Documents And Production Of Docuemtns
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JACK PRAETZELLIS, ESQ. of Fox Rothschild LLP, Tel No. 415-364-5540 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the sole modification as to the number of days to serve responses/documents. PLAINTIFF MARIPOSA VALDES' Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's First Request For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff's request for issue, evidentiary or terminating sanctions is denied. Responses and documents to be served within ten (10) days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $400.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid within twenty days of service of said Order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JACK PRAETZELLIS, ESQ. of Fox Rothschild LLP, Tel No. 415-364-5540 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with the sole modification as to the number of days to serve responses. PLAINTIFF MARIPOSA VALDES'S Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff's request for issue, evidentiary or terminating sanctions is denied. Responses to be served within ten (10) days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $400.00 are awarded to plaintiff to be paid within twenty days of service of said Order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
